title: Gemma-4 12B + Hermes,Google AI Edge: EASY, GOOD & LOCAL!
summary: Google released Gemma-4 12B, a local multimodal AI model designed for agentic workflows on consumer laptops with 16GB VRAM. The model uses an encoder-free multimodal architecture and includes multi-token prediction drafters to reduce inference latency, with support across AI Edge Gallery, LiteRT-LM, Ollama, and other local AI ecosystems.
